text:
A **citation check costs 5 credits**. [Credit Costs table from PRODUCT KNOWLEDGE]

Since credit packs are 100 credits for $10, that works out to roughly **$0.50 per citation scan**.

The good news: you have **50 credits available**, so you can easily run a citation check right now if you'd like to see how many AI engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini) are mentioning your site when asked relevant questions about your industry.

Want me to walk you through how to run one?
